title: actinostemon estrellensis
intro: Actinostemon estrellensis, also known as Estrela do Cerrado or Star of the Cerrado, is a plant species native to Brazil, belonging to the family Euphorbiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Actinostemon estrellensis can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
